description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of art and design with our unique email newsletter. Designed to inspire artists and art enthusiasts alike, this template allows you to share the latest in fine art, design trends, and international celebrations of creativity. Whether you're commemorating World Art Day or showcasing emerging artists, our newsletter is perfect for sharing these moments. It fits seamlessly into news, blog, and magazine platforms, making it a must-have for events and global observances. Connect with a worldwide audience and celebrate the universal language of art with our visually appealing and informative newsletter. Explore the beauty of creativity across borders and cultures, and inspire your subscribers with the power of art.
short_description: Explore the world of art and design with our newsletter. Ideal for artists and enthusiasts, it showcases the latest in fine art, design trends, and global art celebrations like World Art Day. Perfect for news, blogs, magazines, and event platforms. Connect and inspire with the universal language of art.

designer.description:
Graphic Design is at the heart of my story, but I’ve been known to write myself a new part now and again… happily and frequently embracing such roles as: Project Manager, Strategic Thinker, Visual Communicator, Copy Writer, Brand Stylist and Content Curator... magician.

Design is where my passion and my purpose intersect, and providing clients with “the goods” to help their businesses soar is a pretty amazing thing to hop outta’ bed and do each day!

html_data:
ART/ DESIGN / BLOG/ SHOWS
 

APRIL 15, 2021

World Art Day

World Art Day is an international celebration of the fine arts, which was declared by the International Association of Art (IAA/AIAP), a partner of UNESCO, to promote awareness of creative activity worldwide.

MEET THE ARTISTS
 
 

Julia Rodríguez

Mixed Media / Spain

VISIT JULIA'S WEBSITE
 

Victor Beaumont

Contemporary Realist / France

 

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

READ MORE ABOUT VICTOR
 

Maeve McKay

Street Artist / Canada

 

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

VIEW MAEVE'S RECENT WORK
 

Tae Jeong

Abstract Artist / Korea

 

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

DISCOVER TAE'S PROCESS
 

HBD Leo...

The first World Art Day was held on April 15th, 2012, a date chosen in honour of Leonardo da Vinci's birthday. As a symbol of world peace, freedom of expression, tolerance and brotherhood, da Vinci is also a testament to the influence of the Fine Arts on other fields.

SUPPORT ARTISTS WORLDWIDE
 

#WORLDARTDAY
